position: Silver Medalist — International Young Scientist Association (IYSA)
description: Awarded Silver Medal for the project 'PRIME: IoT-Based Smart Glove for Post-Stroke Rehabilitation'. Successfully developed an IoT-based smart glove using a pneumatic system and biometric sensors for patient recovery.

company: ASEAN Innovative Science Environmental and Entrepreneur Fair (AISEEF) 2023
position: Gold Medalist — Indonesian Young Scientist Association (IYSA)
description: Awarded Gold Medal for research on 'Ruminant Biscuits Made From Coconut Dregs'. Developed high-nutrient ruminant feed biscuits using coconut waste (Cocos nucifera L) combined with papaya and lamtoro leaves.

company: Indonesia International Applied Science Project Olympiad (I2ASPO) 2022
position: Silver Medalist — Indonesian Young Scientist Association (IYSA)
description: Awarded Silver Medal for the project 'UPAFOAM Roof Tiles'. Innovated eco-friendly construction materials by utilizing palm fiber waste and styrofoam in the manufacture of concrete roof tiles.
